sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْأَخْبَارَ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ عَبْرَ الْمَوَاقِعِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju svakodnevne vijesti putem elektronskih stranica.
sentences.translationEn: People read daily news through electronic websites.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْمَوَاقِعُ تَنْشُرُ التَّحْدِيثَاتِ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove stranice objavljuju ažuriranja veoma brzo.
sentences.translationEn: These websites publish updates with great speed.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ صِحَّةِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je provjeriti tačnost vijesti prije njenog objavljivanja.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to verify the truth of the news before publishing it.
